note: Fully accessible with lifts, ramps, step-free entrances and free tours; the grounds are largely flat and paved. Easy and free.
Much of the trail is flat and paved/firm with accessible sections and the Boardwalk stretch fully step-free over the water; a few gravel parts. Great for wheeling and strolling.
The bat emergence is viewable from flat, step-free spots on and around the bridge and the adjacent lawn; crowded at dusk but accessible. Free.
A flat, walkable strip of shops, murals and food trucks with step-free sidewalks; a few shops have a step but broadly easy and fun.
The natural spring-fed pool has an accessible entry lift and a ramp on the shallow end, but the grassy banks and some entries are uneven; partly accessible for a swim.
Modern museum with full lift access, step-free galleries and the accessible Ellsworth Kelly chapel; easy throughout.
A large flat park with paved paths, accessible facilities and open lawns; broadly easy for families, some grass and gravel areas.
The classic Mount Bonnell viewpoint is reached by a steep staircase with no accessible route; the wider Hill Country is rugged. Not suitable for wheels. Alt: lakeside overlooks by car.
Most barbecue joints and food-truck lots are at ground level with step-free service, though lines are long and some gravel lots are bumpy. Broadly accessible.
A modern open-air shopping district with flat, smooth, fully step-free sidewalks and accessible parking; very easy, well north of downtown.
A modern museum with full lift access and step-free galleries on the UT campus; accessible parking and entry. Easy.
